message:
perf: replace Box::pin() with std::pin::pin!() macro for stack-pinned futures

Eliminates heap allocations for short-lived pinned futures in polling
hot paths. The std::pin::pin!() macro pins the future on the stack
instead of boxing it on the heap, which is both faster and avoids an
allocation+deallocation cycle per poll.

Affected sites:
- cx/scope.rs: 10 occurrences in Scope drain logic and test join futures
- runtime/builder.rs: run_future_with_budget() polling loop
- runtime/yield_now.rs: yield_now() test
- sync/barrier.rs: block_on() test helper

All sites are local futures that do not need to outlive the current
stack frame, making stack pinning safe and strictly better than boxing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
